feed.title: garden.errbufferoverfl.me - tool
feed.description: An open collection of notes, resources, sketches, and explorations I'm cultivating.
feed.subtitle: Recent content in tool on
feed.author: errbuffoverfl

entry.title: Cytoscape.js
entry.summary: Website Graph theory (network) library for visualisation and analysis.

entry.title: Refactoring Guru
entry.summary: Website Provides high-level and implementation guides for common design patterns and refactoring.

entry.title: Dopely
entry.summary: Website A bunch of helpful colour tools like pallet, tone, tint and shade generators. Also has digital colour tools for checking contrast and colour blindcheckers.

entry.title: npm - SES
entry.summary: Website SES is hardened JavaScript. SES stands for fearless cooperation. This package is a SES shim for JavaScript features proposed to ECMA TC39.
